title: Tilath Keer
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Tilath Keer |homeworld=[[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[Twin Suns Squadron]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Tilath, are you ready for your payload''"
"''Yes, Great One.''"
"''Don't worry Tilath. No one has to do the dishes every time.|Jaina Solo and Tilath Keer|''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''}} '''Tilath Keer''' was a [[Commenor/Legends|Commenorian]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Twin Suns Squadron]], serving under first [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and later [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] as Twin Suns Eleven. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tilath Keer |es=Tilath Keer }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Keer, Tilath}} [[Category:Commenori]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:New Republic Starfighter Corps personnel]]
